log: REASONING: Throwing rock at Siren — Unarmored Caster (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:8+9=17 vs AC 15] HIT! 34 damage. Siren — Unarmored Caster HP: 33/67
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Siren — Unarmored Caster.
→ Javelin: [d20:13+6=19 vs AC 15] HIT! 10 damage. Siren — Unarmored Caster HP: 23/67
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:5+3=8 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:13+-2=11 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:1+-2=-1 vs DC 16] FAIL!

REASONING: All 3 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
